meta.title: Hotel Dream Rimini | 150m from the Sea – New Management 2026
meta.description: Hotel Dream in Miramare, Rimini: 35 rooms 150 meters from the sea, breakfast 7:00-11:00, private parking, close to Miramare station and Metro Mare. New management 2026.
meta.hotelDesc: Discover Hotel Dream in Miramare, Rimini: new management 2026, 150m from the sea, 35 comfortable rooms and a young team ready to welcome you.
meta.roomsDesc: Choose from 7 room types: single, double, suite, triple, quadruple, family and group. All with air conditioning, TV and Wi-Fi.
meta.breakfastDesc: Start your day with our rich breakfast included in the price. Sweet and savory, fresh products every morning.
meta.barDesc: The internal bar at Hotel Dream: aperitifs, drinks and snacks in a relaxed and informal atmosphere.
meta.servicesDesc: Free Wi-Fi, private parking, bicycles and e-bikes, solarium area, beach and restaurant agreements. Everything for your holiday.
meta.parkingDesc: Private internal parking at Hotel Dream Rimini: convenient, safe, at €10 per day. Book your spot.
meta.offersDesc: The best offers at Hotel Dream Rimini: weekend packages, fairs, couples, families and business. Book directly and save.
meta.attractionsDesc: Discover what to visit near Hotel Dream: amusement parks, Rimini old town, Rimini Fiera, beaches and nightlife.
meta.contactsDesc: Hotel Dream Rimini: book online, phone, WhatsApp and map. Miramare, 150m from the beach — new management 2026.

home.introTitle: Your dream just steps from the sea
home.introText: In the heart of Miramare, just 150 metres from the beach, Hotel Dream is the ideal starting point for experiencing the Romagna Riviera in all its authenticity. With our new 2026 management, we have redefined every aspect of the property: fresh interiors, attentive service and a young, relaxed atmosphere, without sacrificing the comfort and attention to detail that make every stay special.
home.introHighlight: 35 comfortable rooms, a rich breakfast included every morning and a team ready to make your holiday unforgettable.
home.roomsSubtitle: Comfort and hospitality for every need
home.servicesHighlightTitle: Services designed to simplify your stay
home.servicesHighlightSubtitle: Breakfast included, internal bar, solarium area and private parking: a selection of services created to let you enjoy Rimini in a comfortable, light and worry‑free way, whether on holiday or on a business trip.
home.servicesIntroTitle: It’s a pleasure to welcome you to Rimini
home.servicesIntroParagraph1: Tucked away in a quiet corner of Miramare, just 150 metres from the sea, Hotel Dream is your relaxed and comfortable address on the Romagna Riviera. A freshly managed hotel, young and attentive, where hospitality and simplicity come first.
home.servicesIntroParagraph2: Close to the beach, Rimini’s centre and the exhibition district, with well-kept rooms, breakfast included and many services designed for you, Dream is the ideal starting point for a seaside break or a stress-free business stay.
home.offersSubtitle: Our proposals for your ideal stay

reviews.title: What our guests say
reviews.subtitle: Verified reviews from TripAdvisor
reviews.review1Text: I've known the Dream for 10 years now; between long weekends and summer holidays I've lost count of how many times I've stayed. When I go to Rimini I can only choose this hotel for the comfort it offers: well-kept, clean rooms, excellent food and the availability of Milva and Andrea, the owners.
reviews.review2Text: I've known Hotel Dream for a long time. Eight years ago I organised a week's holiday with my daughter and stayed here. Clean, well organised, I've kept coming back even just for a weekend and I've recommended it to friends. In one of the side streets of central Miramare, the hotel is well located. The food is good and I've always found great courtesy and availability. Good value for money. I recommend it with confidence.
reviews.review3Text: We stayed at the hotel for Rimini Wellness 2025. The staff is very attentive and professional. The hotel is very clean, especially the rooms. Breakfast is very rich and varied. They offer an excellent dinner for only €20 per person. Excellent value for money. Recommended experience!
reviews.review4Text: We stayed at Hotel Dream: extremely polite staff and very kind owners. Full board: buffet breakfast really full with a wide choice, excellent lunch and dinner with daily specials. Very clean rooms and daily towel change, just a few steps from the affiliated beach. Absolutely recommend, we will return.

hotel.title: The Hotel
hotel.subtitle: New Management 2026
hotel.description: Hotel Dream is a fully renovated property in Miramare di Rimini, just 150 metres from the beach. With our new 2026 management, we have redefined the concept of hospitality on the Romagna Riviera: a modern, refined and welcoming environment where every detail is designed to make you feel at home from the very first moment you step through the door.
hotel.description2: With 35 comfortable rooms, a rich breakfast included every morning, an internal bar that is always open, private parking and a solarium area, Hotel Dream offers everything you need for a relaxing holiday or a business trip without compromise. Our strategic location lets you reach the beach, Rimini's historic centre and the exhibition district in just a few minutes.
hotel.positionText: Just 150 metres from the golden beach of Miramare, in a quiet residential area yet perfectly connected. Rimini's old town is 12 minutes by car, Rimini Fiera 20 minutes, and vibrant Riccione just 15 minutes away. Miramare train station is within walking distance.
hotel.conceptText: Young, smart, informal yet refined in every detail. Hotel Dream is not just a hotel: it is a place where you feel free to be yourself, where authentic hospitality meets modern comfort. Every space has been designed to create a relaxed and pleasant atmosphere, from the lobby to the outdoor garden.
hotel.teamText: A young, dynamic team passionate about hospitality, ready to make every stay an unforgettable experience. We speak Italian, English and German, and we are always happy to recommend the best experiences on the Romagna Riviera.
hotel.commonAreasSubtitle: A collage of our spaces: lobby, bar, solarium, kids' room and exteriors. Modern areas to relax during your stay — see the Services page for more photos and details.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: 7 types for every need
rooms.singleDesc: Cozy and functional, ideal for solo travelers. Equipped with all comforts for a pleasant stay.
rooms.doubleDesc: Spacious and bright, perfect for couples or those who want more space. Comfort and relaxation guaranteed.
rooms.suiteDesc: Our most exclusive option: elegant and refined rooms for a romantic and unforgettable stay.
rooms.tripleDesc: Ideal for small groups or families. Space and comfort for three people in total relaxation.
rooms.quadrupleDesc: Spacious and comfortable, designed for families or groups of friends. All the space you need.
rooms.groupDesc: For groups of up to 6-7 people. The ideal solution for those who travel together without giving up comfort.
rooms.familyDesc: Designed for large families, up to 5-6 people. Generous spaces and everything needed for adults and children.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.subtitle: Included in every stay
breakfast.description: Every morning a rich buffet breakfast awaits you to start your day with energy and good mood. Carefully selected fresh products, artisan pastries, seasonal fruit, local cold cuts and cheeses, freshly baked bread and a complete selection of hot and cold drinks. Everything is prepared with care to offer you a genuine and flavourful experience.
breakfast.description2: Our breakfast room is bright, spacious and welcoming — the perfect place to plan your day over a good coffee, chat with other guests or simply enjoy a moment of peace before heading to the beach. Breakfast time: 7:00 AM - 11:00 AM.
breakfast.sweetItems: Croissants, cakes, cookies, jams, honey, cereals, yogurt
breakfast.savoryItems: Cold cuts, cheeses, eggs, fresh bread, toast
breakfast.drinksItems: Coffee, cappuccino, tea, fruit juices, milk
breakfast.freshItems: Seasonal fruit, fresh juices and extracts

bar.title: Bar
bar.subtitle: The heart of conviviality
bar.description: Our internal bar is the beating heart of the hotel: a cosy and informal meeting point open from morning to late evening. Whether you want to start your day with a creamy espresso, enjoy a sunset aperitif or unwind with an after-dinner drink, the Hotel Dream bar is always ready to welcome you.
bar.description2: A warm and relaxed atmosphere, with a distinctive counter and a selection of cocktails, wines, craft beers, soft drinks and snacks prepared with fresh ingredients. The ideal place to socialise, plan your evening or simply enjoy a moment all to yourself.

solarium.title: Solarium
solarium.subtitle: Soak up the sun at your own pace
solarium.description: Our solarium area is designed for guests who want a break from the beach without giving up the sunshine. Deckchairs, sun umbrellas and a peaceful setting invite you to unwind between a swim, a stroll and an aperitif at the bar.
solarium.description2: Reserved for hotel guests, it is a quiet, convenient outdoor corner when you prefer to stay on property while still enjoying the open air.

kidsRoom.title: Kids' playroom
kidsRoom.subtitle: A fun corner for families
kidsRoom.description: The kids' room is a welcoming, safe space where children can play, read and meet other young guests, always with parents nearby. Ideal for families holidaying in Miramare, it makes everyone’s stay more relaxed.
kidsRoom.description2: You will find games suited to different ages and areas that spark imagination and sociability — perfect for a break after a day at the beach or a theme park.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Everything for your perfect stay
services.breakfastDesc: Rich sweet and savory buffet breakfast every morning, with fresh and artisan products, all included in the room price.
services.barDesc: Aperitifs, cocktails, coffee bar and fresh snacks in a relaxed atmosphere. Open from morning to late evening for every wish.
services.solariumDesc: Relax in our solarium area with deckchairs and sun umbrellas, the ideal place to soak up the sun in total tranquillity.
services.parkingDesc: Private internal parking at the property, convenient and safe. Advance reservation recommended, especially during high season.
services.wifiDesc: Fast and free Wi-Fi connection throughout the property: rooms, common areas, bar and garden.
services.beachDesc: Active agreements with the best beach establishments nearby, at reserved prices for our guests.
services.cleaningDesc: Daily room cleaning and tidying service to ensure maximum hygiene and comfort.
services.acDesc: Autonomous air conditioning in every room for maximum comfort in any season.
services.tvDesc: Flat-screen TV with national and international channels available in every room.
services.bikesDesc: Classic bicycles and e-bikes for hire to explore Rimini, the cycle path and the surroundings in total freedom.
services.restaurantsDesc: Partnerships with restaurants in the area to enjoy Romagna and Mediterranean cuisine at special prices. Active agreement with La Cucina di Purograno.
services.kidsAreaDesc: A dedicated space for children to play in safety, designed for families on holiday.
services.receptionDesc: We welcome you in Italian, English and German to assist you throughout your entire stay with tips, bookings and information.
services.faqSectionTitle: FAQ — Hotel in Rimini and Miramare
services.faq1Question: Where is Hotel Dream and how far is it from the beach?
services.faq1Answer: Hotel Dream is at Viale Tirrenia 10 in Miramare di Rimini, about 150 metres from the beach. From here you can easily reach the seafront, Miramare station and the Metro Mare stop.
services.faq2Question: How do I book a room?
services.faq2Answer: Book through the official TeamSystem Hospitality booking engine linked on our website: check real-time availability, rates and confirm your stay securely. For special requests you can also message us on WhatsApp.
services.faq3Question: Is breakfast included and what are the hours?
services.faq3Answer: Yes. Breakfast is included and served in the breakfast room from 7:00 to 11:00 with a sweet and savoury buffet, hot and cold drinks and fresh products.
services.faq4Question: Is parking available and how much does it cost?
services.faq4Answer: We have private indoor parking subject to availability, at about €10 per day. We recommend reserving a space, especially in high season.
services.faq5Question: Is Hotel Dream a good choice for Rimini trade fairs?
services.faq5Answer: Yes. From Miramare, Rimini Fiera is about 20 minutes by car; you can also use the train from Miramare station. Wi-Fi, breakfast and parking suit business travellers.
services.faq6Question: What are check-in and check-out times?
services.faq6Answer: Check-in from 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM; check-out by 10:00 AM. Please inform us in advance for arrivals after 10:00 PM. A valid ID is required for all guests at check-in.
services.faq7Answer: Yes, Wi-Fi is free throughout the hotel: rooms, common areas, bar and outdoor spaces where available.
services.faq8Question: How do I get there by train or from Federico Fellini Airport?
services.faq8Answer: The hotel is close to Miramare station and the Metro Mare stop. From the A14 motorway use exit Rimini Sud; the airport is about 10 km by car or taxi.
services.faq9Answer: In general: free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival; between 7 and 3 days before, the first night may be charged; within 48 hours or no-show, the full stay may be charged. Conditions may vary in high season or during fairs — check when booking.
services.faq10Question: Is the hotel family-friendly in Rimini?
services.faq10Answer: Yes. We offer family and triple rooms, a kids’ area and services tailored for families on the Romagna Riviera.
services.faq11Question: Do you have agreements with restaurants and beach clubs?
services.faq11Answer: Yes, we have agreements with partner restaurants in Rimini and Miramare and with nearby beach establishments, with preferential rates for guests.
services.faq12Question: How far are Rimini centre, the fair and Riccione?
services.faq12Answer: From Miramare you can reach Rimini old town, the fair area and Viale Ceccarini in Riccione in a few minutes by car. Metro Mare connects the coast quickly between Rimini and Riccione.

parking.title: Parking
parking.subtitle: Convenient, safe, internal
parking.description: Hotel Dream has a private internal parking, the ideal solution for those arriving by car. No parking problems: your spot is waiting for you.
parking.note: Advance booking is recommended, especially during high season.

offers.title: Offers & Packages
offers.subtitle: Our proposals for you
offers.cosmoprofDesc: Take advantage of our special offer during the Cosmoprof fair in Bologna. Convenient location to reach the fair.
offers.weekendDesc: Treat yourself to the perfect weekend on the Romagna Riviera: two nights of relaxation with breakfast included and a welcome aperitif for two at our internal bar. The ideal combination to escape routine, enjoy the beach and discover the best of Rimini.
offers.weekendIncludes: 2 nights · Rich breakfast included · Welcome aperitif for 2 · Room with balcony · Parking available
offers.couplesDesc: A romantic stay designed for two: room with balcony, breakfast with a view and a welcome aperitif. Perfect for anniversaries, romantic getaways or simply enjoying time together on the Riviera.
offers.couplesIncludes: Double room with balcony · Breakfast included · Welcome aperitif · Parking available
offers.familyDesc: Bring the whole family to Rimini! Spacious rooms for families of up to 5-6 people, generous breakfast, beach 150 metres away and amusement parks nearby. Children will love the Romagna Riviera.
offers.familyIncludes: Family room · Breakfast included for all · Beach and park agreements · Parking available
offers.businessDesc: For those who travel for work without sacrificing comfort. Fast Wi-Fi, early-bird breakfast, strategic location near Rimini Fiera and the exhibition district. Dedicated rates for multiple-night stays.
offers.businessIncludes: Single or double room · Fast Wi-Fi · Breakfast included · Parking available · Near Rimini Fiera
offers.weekendSeaDesc: Two days of sun, sea and relaxation: room with balcony, breakfast included and beach agreement with reserved umbrella and sunbeds. Perfect for a rejuvenating weekend just steps from the sea.
offers.weekendSeaIncludes: 2 nights · Room with balcony · Breakfast included · Beach agreement with umbrella and sunbeds
offers.eventsDesc: Stay at Hotel Dream during Rimini fairs and events: Rimini Fiera 20 minutes away, convenient and quiet location, breakfast included and private parking. Special rates for groups and extended stays.
offers.eventsIncludes: Room of your choice · Breakfast included · Private parking · 20 min from Rimini Fiera · Group rates
offers.comingSoonDesc: Contact us for a personalised quote for this package.

attractions.title: What to See
attractions.subtitle: Attractions and points of interest near us
attractions.intro: Rimini and the Romagna Riviera offer endless possibilities for fun, culture, gastronomy and relaxation. From family theme parks to vibrant nightlife, from a historic centre rich in history to the golden beach just steps away: here are the best experiences you can enjoy during your stay at Hotel Dream.
attractions.italiaInMiniaturaDesc: The theme park that reproduces Italy's most famous monuments in scale. Fun for the whole family.
attractions.mirabilandiaDesc: Italy's largest amusement park with breathtaking attractions for all ages.
attractions.fiabilandiaDesc: Amusement park designed for children, with fairy-tale themed attractions.
attractions.aquafanDesc: Europe's most famous water park: slides, wave pools and lots of music.
attractions.oltremareDesc: Educational and fun park dedicated to the marine world: dolphins, sharks and much more.
attractions.centroStoricoDesc: The Arch of Augustus, the Malatesta Temple, Piazza Cavour: centuries of history to discover while strolling.
attractions.fieraDesc: One of Italy's most important exhibition centers, hosting international events throughout the year.
attractions.ceccariniDesc: The ultimate shopping and strolling street: boutiques, ice cream shops and trendy bars.
attractions.nightlifeDesc: The Romagna Riviera is famous for its clubs and discos: Cocoricò, Byblos, Altromondo Studios, Peter Pan and many more.
attractions.metromareDesc: Rapid line on a dedicated lane connecting Rimini and Riccione in just a few minutes, with stops in Miramare close to the hotel. Perfect for moving between the beach, city centre and Viale Ceccarini without using the car.
attractions.metromareDist: Miramare stop a few minutes’ walk
attractions.parksDesc: Rimini and surroundings offer countless outdoor activities: hiking, water sports, food and wine tours and much more.

contact.title: Contacts
contact.subtitle: We are here for you
contact.whatsappHint: For special requests, last-minute needs or questions before booking, message us on WhatsApp — we reply as soon as we can.
contact.findUsText: We are in Miramare di Rimini, just 150 meters from the sea. Easily reachable from the A14 highway, Rimini train station and Miramare station (Miramare stop of the train and Metro Mare).
contact.bookingBody: Book directly on the official TeamSystem Hospitality engine: real-time availability, clear rates and secure confirmation. For special requests, contact us on WhatsApp.

legal.privacyIntro: This privacy policy describes how Hotel Dream, located at Viale Tirrenia 10, 47924 Miramare di Rimini (RN), Italy, as Data Controller, collects, uses and protects personal data in accordance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Italian legislation.
legal.privacyDataController:
DATA CONTROLLER

The Data Controller is Hotel Dream, Viale Tirrenia 10, 47924 Miramare di Rimini (RN), Italy. For any request related to personal data processing, please write to onlyyoumisahotel@gmail.com.
legal.privacyDataCollected:
DATA COLLECTED

We collect the following personal data:
• Identification data: name, surname, date of birth, ID document
• Contact data: email address, phone number, postal address
• Stay data: check-in and check-out dates, room preferences, special requests
• Browsing data: IP address, browser type, pages visited, technical and analytical cookies
legal.privacyPurpose:
PURPOSE OF PROCESSING

Personal data is processed for:
• Managing bookings and stays at our property
• Fulfilling legal obligations (guest registration with police authorities)
• Sending service communications related to the stay
• Sending newsletters and promotional offers (only with explicit consent)
• Improving services through anonymous statistical analysis
legal.privacyLegalBasis:
LEGAL BASIS

Data processing is based on:
• Performance of the accommodation contract
• Compliance with legal obligations (public safety regulations)
• Consent of the data subject (for marketing communications)
• Legitimate interest of the Controller (for statistical analysis and service improvement)
legal.privacyRetention:
DATA RETENTION

Personal data is retained for the time strictly necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected:
• Booking and stay data: 10 years (tax obligations)
• Public safety data: as per applicable regulations
• Marketing data: until consent is withdrawn
• Browsing data: 26 months
legal.privacyRights:
DATA SUBJECT RIGHTS

You have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Request rectification or deletion of data
• Restrict or object to processing
• Request data portability
• Withdraw consent at any time
• Lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority

To exercise your rights, please write to onlyyoumisahotel@gmail.com.
legal.privacyThirdParties:
DISCLOSURE TO THIRD PARTIES

Personal data may be disclosed to:
• Public Safety Authorities (legal obligation)
• IT and hosting service providers (data processors)
• Web analytics platforms (in anonymised form)

Data is never sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.privacyCookiesRef:
COOKIES

For detailed information about cookie usage, please refer to our Cookie Policy.
legal.privacyChanges:
CHANGES TO THIS PRIVACY POLICY

Hotel Dream reserves the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes will be published on this page with the date of last update.
legal.cookieIntro: This Cookie Policy describes the types of cookies used by the Hotel Dream website (hoteldreamrimini.it) and how users can manage them, in compliance with EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR) and the ePrivacy Directive.
legal.cookieWhat:
WHAT ARE COOKIES

Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device during browsing. They serve to make the site more functional, remember user preferences and collect anonymous information about site usage.
legal.cookieTypes:
TYPES OF COOKIES USED

Our site uses the following categories of cookies:
• Technical cookies (always active)
• Analytical cookies (with consent)
• Marketing cookies (with consent)
legal.cookieTechnical:
TECHNICAL COOKIES

These are necessary for the proper functioning of the site. They enable navigation, language management, and storage of cookie consent preferences. They do not require user consent as they are essential for service delivery.
legal.cookieAnalytics:
ANALYTICAL COOKIES

Used to collect anonymous information about how visitors use the site (most visited pages, time spent, traffic source). This data helps us improve the browsing experience. We use these cookies only with user consent.
legal.cookieMarketing:
MARKETING COOKIES

Used to track visitors and display relevant advertisements. They are set only with explicit user consent and may be used by third parties (e.g. social platforms) for advertising retargeting.
legal.cookieManage:
MANAGING COOKIES

Users can manage cookie preferences through:
• The cookie consent banner displayed on the site at first visit
• Their browser settings
• Online tools such as youronlinechoices.eu

Disabling technical cookies may compromise site navigation.
legal.cookieChanges:
CHANGES TO THIS COOKIE POLICY

Hotel Dream reserves the right to update this Cookie Policy. Any changes will be published on this page with the date of last update.
legal.policiesIntro: Below are the main rules and policies of Hotel Dream to ensure a pleasant and transparent stay for all our guests. Please read the following information carefully before booking.
legal.policiesCheckin:
CHECK-IN AND CHECK-OUT

• Check-in: from 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM
• Check-out: by 10:00 AM
• Early check-in and late check-out are subject to availability and may incur additional charges
• A valid ID document is required at check-in for all guests (legal requirement)
• For arrivals after 10:00 PM, please notify the property in advance
legal.policiesCancellation:
CANCELLATION POLICY

• Free cancellation up to 7 days before arrival date
• Cancellation between 7 and 3 days before: charge for the first night
• Cancellation within 48 hours or no-show: charge for the entire stay
• Cancellation policies may vary during high season, fairs or special events
• Please verify specific conditions at the time of booking
legal.policiesChildren:
CHILDREN AND FAMILIES

• Children are welcome at Hotel Dream
• Cots and extra beds are available upon request (subject to availability)
• Children must be accompanied by an adult in common areas at all times
• Breakfast is included for all registered guests
legal.policiesPets:
PETS

Hotel Dream does not currently accept pets. We apologise for the inconvenience and invite you to contact us for any specific needs.
legal.policiesSmoking:
SMOKING POLICY

• Hotel Dream is entirely non-smoking
• Smoking is prohibited in all rooms, corridors and enclosed common areas
• Smoking is permitted in designated outdoor areas (terrace, patio)
• Violation of the smoking ban will result in a charge for room sanitisation
legal.policiesParking:
PARKING

• Private internal parking is subject to availability
• Parking costs are to be agreed at the time of booking
• Advance booking is recommended, especially during high season
• The parking area is unattended: management is not responsible for any damage or theft
legal.policiesBreakfast:
BREAKFAST

• Breakfast is included in the room rate
• Breakfast hours: from 7:30 AM to 10:00 AM
• Breakfast is served in the breakfast room on the ground floor
• For special dietary requirements (allergies, intolerances, special diets) please inform us at the time of booking
legal.policiesDamages:
DAMAGES AND LIABILITY

• Guests are responsible for any damage caused to the room or property during their stay
• In case of damage, the hotel reserves the right to charge repair or replacement costs
• Valuables can be stored at the reception
• The hotel is not responsible for items left unattended in common areas
legal.policiesCheckout:
PAYMENT

• We accept cash, credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard)
• Payment for the stay is required at check-in or check-out, as agreed
• A deposit may be required for extended stays
legal.policiesChanges:
CHANGES TO POLICIES

Hotel Dream reserves the right to update these hotel policies. Changes will be published on this page with the date of last update.
